title: Functions should not be empty
description: An empty method is generally considered bad practice and can lead to confusion, readability, and maintenance issues. Empty methods bring no functionality and are misleading to others as they might think the method implementation fulfills a specific and identified requirement. There are several reasons for a method not to have a body: It is an unintentional omission, and should be fixed to prevent an unexpected behavior in production.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Function declaration is empty. Add implementation or remove if not needed.
Anonymous function expression is empty. Add implementation or remove if not needed.
Assigned function expression is empty. Add implementation or remove if not needed.
Arrow function is empty. Add implementation or use undefined/null if intentionally empty.
Function contains only comments. Add implementation or use TODO comment if placeholder.
Arrow function contains only comments. Add implementation or use TODO comment if placeholder.
Function contains only block comments. Add implementation or use TODO comment if placeholder.
